title: Companions Lore Pack
tagline: Deep lore knowledge for all Companions members about lycanthropy and Ysgramor.
description:
A knowledge pack that gives Companions members deep awareness of their faction's history, the nature of lycanthropy, and their personal relationships within Jorrvaskr.

NPCs will reference:
- The original Five Hundred Companions and Ysgramor
- The secret of the Circle and the beast blood
- Kodlak's quest for a cure
- Internal tensions between the Circle members
- Their training philosophy and honor code
author: thalia
